briefs.title: Mental Health Regulation Updated: New Form 5 Added for Patient Documentation
briefs.summary: BC amended its Mental Health Regulation to add a new official form — Form 5 — used in the mental health care process. This change took effect December 15, 2025, and applies to facilities and professionals operating under the Mental Health Act.
briefs.action_required: Review Form 5 and update your intake or documentation processes if you operate a mental health facility.
